nasb.text: Seeing them straining at the oars, for the wind was against them, at about the fourth watch of the night He *came to them, walking on the sea; and He intended to pass by them.

esv.text: And he saw that they were making headway painfully, for the wind was against them. And about the fourth watch of the night he came to them, walking on the sea. He meant to pass by them,

cnv.text: 看見門徒辛辛苦苦地搖櫓，因為風不順。天快亮的時候，耶穌在海面上向他們走去，想要趕過他們。

ccb.text: 大约凌晨三点钟，祂看见门徒在逆风中摇橹，非常吃力，就从水面上朝门徒走去，想要从他们旁边经过。

csbs.text: 他看见门徒们由于逆风，划船非常艰苦。天快亮的时候，耶稣在湖面上行走，向他们而去，想要从他们旁边走过去。
